name: Toile Garden Floral Shower Curtain Sage - Threshold™
description:
Transform your bathroom into a blooming orchard with this Traditional Toile Garden Floral Shower Curtain from Threshold™. This decorative shower curtain features an allover flowering vine print in different hues on a light green background for sweet style. Made of 100% cotton, this printed shower curtain features a buttonhole top for quick installation, while the machine-washable design allows for easy cleaning when needed.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
